title: Dolomiaea costus
taxonomy: Dolomiaea costus belongs to the family Asteraceae and is classified as a perennial plant. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and Tibet. The classification of Dolomiaea costus is further divided into the genus Dolomiaea and the species D. costus. This plant is a member of the Compositae clade and is closely related to other species within the same family. The classification of Dolomiaea costus reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
